---
title: " "
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    df_print: paged
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="page-title">Cyanobacteria for Mars Habitation</div>

<div class="research-layout">
<nav class="research-nav">
<p class="research-nav-title">Projects</p>
<a href="research-bph.html">PCB Degradation</a>
<a class="active" href="research-mars.html">Mars Habitation</a>
<a href="research-phylo.html">Microcystin Phylogenetics</a>
</nav>
<div class="research-content">

<img class="research-hero-img" src="images/research-mars.jpg" alt="Cyanobacteria bioreactor">

## Background

*[Placeholder — what the project investigated and why. The context of cyanobacteria as a candidate for off-world oxygen/biomass production, and what motivated the work.]*

## Approach

*[Placeholder — your methods: how you grew the cyanobacteria, the bioreactor setup, conditions tested, what you measured. A photo of the bioreactor or setup would fit well here.]*

## Results / What Was Done

*[Placeholder — findings or outcomes of the work.]*

## Future Directions

*[Placeholder — where this line of work could go, or how it informed your later research.]*

</div>
</div>
